evals.name: chinese-faculty-homepage
evals.prompt: 帮我解析一下这位老师的主页，我要抽取结构化信息，最好是 JSON 格式：https://jiankang.usst.edu.cn/2021/0611/c13509a248959/page.htm
evals.expected_output: A JSON object with 15 fields. At minimum: name='杨建涛', institution='上海理工大学', college_department contains '健康科学与工程学院', academic_title='副教授', phone='021-55270127', email='jty@usst.edu.cn', country_region='中国', avatar_url is a non-null URL, research_areas is a non-empty list that includes a biomechanics/robotics/wearable sensor term. gender=null (not inferable), birth_date=null.

evals.name: middle-eastern-faculty-homepage
evals.prompt: Extract the profile info from this faculty page into JSON: https://www.zu.ac.ae/main/en/colleges/colleges/__college_of_technological_innovation/faculty_and_staff/_auh/_computing-and-applied-technology/_profiles/monther_aldwairi
evals.expected_output: A JSON object with 15 fields. At minimum: name contains 'Monther Aldwairi', institution='Zayed University', college_department contains 'College of Technological Innovation', academic_title='Professor', phone='+971 2 599 3238', country_region='阿联酋', avatar_url is a non-null URL, research_areas is a non-empty list mentioning security/AI. email may be null (page uses contact form).

evals.name: partial-field-request
evals.prompt: 从 https://jiankang.usst.edu.cn/2021/0611/c13509a248959/page.htm 这个页面里，只告诉我这位老师的邮箱、研究方向和头像链接就行。
evals.expected_output: Three fields returned clearly: email='jty@usst.edu.cn', research_directions or research_areas list populated with biomechanics/rehab-robotics topics, avatar_url pointing to a real image URL under jiankang.usst.edu.cn. Acceptable to return the full 15-field JSON and highlight the three requested fields.
